title: Workspace Maintenance Pressure View
goal: Implement #454 by merging audit, retention, footprint, and closeout residue signals into one compact maintenance-pressure view with details behind selectors.
non_goals: Do not make maintenance pressure part of every startup unless active pressure exists.
Do not remove detailed proof, review, or closeout sections before the merged view proves useful.

intent.outcome: Agents see one maintenance-pressure concept first instead of separate audit, retention, footprint, stale-current, external-evidence, and closeout residue concepts.
intent.constraints: Keep current execution pressure separate from maintenance residue and keep detailed subcategories selectable.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest report/summary payload and docs wording that merges residue signals without hiding actionable current work.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the work requires removing existing detailed sections or changing archive/delete behavior.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, close #454, and promote #455 current-memory removal.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof selector, planning doctor, and report/summary dogfood output

invariants: Current execution pressure remains separate from maintenance residue.
Details remain available through selectors or full profiles.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #455-#460 plus #467/#469/#471 remain in the feature-tier and surface-merge lane.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #454 closeout, promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Default report output now has one maintenance-pressure router that points to existing findings, closeout_trust, external_work_delta, operational_compression, and module_reports detail selectors.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The active planning record's package-workflow evidence remains lower-trust until closeout records actual package surfaces used; closeout must keep that evidence current.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: workspace CLI tests, focused report tests, ruff, proof selector, report dogfood output, maintenance_pressure selector, planning doctor, root CLI authority query, and maintainer-surface checks passed.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Merge residue signals into one maintenance-pressure view.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not drown current action, remove detailed selectors, or delete artifacts.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which report/summary fields are primary versus detailed selectors.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The change requires policy decisions about retention or deletion.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Collapse many residue concepts into one low-noise router-shaped maintenance signal.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can an agent understand maintenance residue without scanning several historical/detail sections?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed slice, close #454, and promote #455 current-memory removal.
invariants: Current execution pressure remains separate from maintenance residue.
Details remain available through selectors or full profiles.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_output.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/report_contract.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/workspace_report.schema.json tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-maintenance-pressure-view.plan.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section maintenance_pressure --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
completion_criteria: Compact output has one maintenance-pressure block when relevant.
Recommended current action is not drowned by residue.
Existing detailed sections are reused, demoted, or clearly marked as detail.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Default report output now carries one maintenance_pressure block for audit, retention, footprint, external-evidence, and closeout residue while detailed sections stay selectable.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused report tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof selection, root CLI authority review, planning doctor, report dogfood output, maintenance_pressure selector, maintainer-surface refresh, and planning-surface check passed.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #455 current-memory removal remains the next #450 child.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archive plan records #454 as closed while keeping #450 continuation explicit.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "report"; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_output.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/report_contract.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/workspace_report.schema.json tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-maintenance-pressure-view.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section maintenance_pressure --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
proof_report.proof achieved now: Compact report output exposes one maintenance-pressure block; detailed residue remains behind selectors.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Router output no longer includes separate closeout_trust, external_work_delta, or operational_compression blocks and instead includes maintenance_pressure subcategories that link to those sections.

discard.summary: Local validation transcript details beyond commands and pass/fail status.

continuation.summary: #455 current-memory removal is the next bounded #450 child.

config_check.summary: Direct report-rendering edits remain allowed runtime/derived-renderer work with root CLI authority proof.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Completed by adding maintenance_pressure as the compact default report residue router.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Merge residue signals into one maintenance-pressure view.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane feature-tier-and-surface-merge activates a fresh bounded slice.
